en.title: Best Laptops 2026
en.description: Tracks the top laptops across all budgets, from ultraportable MacBooks to Windows powerhouses and gaming rigs.

zh-tw.title: 最佳筆電 2026
zh-tw.description: 追蹤各預算最佳筆電排行，從輕薄 MacBook 到 Windows 生產力主力機與電競機皆涵蓋。

en.description: Apple's M5-powered ultraportable with Wi-Fi 7, 18-hour battery, 512GB base storage, and a 10-core CPU that benchmarks 22% faster than M4.

zh-tw.description: M5 晶片讓 CPU 效能比 M4 快 22%，AI 處理速度快四倍，Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳，電池撐 18 小時的輕薄本，台幣三萬多的售價買的是這個重量下最強的效能。

en.description: Apple's professional laptop with a 120Hz ProMotion display, 24GB unified memory, and M4 Pro chip delivering sustained performance for video editing and software development.

zh-tw.description: 120Hz ProMotion 螢幕、M4 Pro 晶片、24GB 記憶體，剪 4K 影片、跑 Xcode 模擬器毫無壓力，台幣六萬多買到的是這個螢幕尺寸裡最強的持續效能。

en.description: Dell's flagship thin-and-light Windows laptop powered by Intel Panther Lake, delivering 25+ hour battery life and a stunning OLED display option.

zh-tw.description: Intel Panther Lake 新架構讓續航突破 25 小時，搭配可選 OLED 螢幕，這台是目前效能、螢幕、電池三者最均衡的 Windows 輕薄本，台幣四萬多的售價在 Windows 旗艦中有競爭力。

en.description: ASUS's premium ultrabook with an OLED display, Intel Core Ultra 7 258V, 32GB RAM, and Thunderbolt 4, hitting the sweet spot between performance and affordability.

zh-tw.description: OLED 螢幕、Intel Core Ultra 7、32GB 記憶體、Thunderbolt 4，不到台幣三萬的定價是這份榜單最高 CP 值的存在，螢幕色準和對比直接超越兩倍價格的競品。

en.description: Lenovo's top-tier 2-in-1 with Intel Core Ultra 7 258V, 32GB RAM, an OLED display, and a 360-degree hinge for tablet and tent modes.

zh-tw.description: 可 360 度翻轉的旗艦二合一，Intel Core Ultra 7、32GB 記憶體、OLED 螢幕，帶著去開會寫報告，翻面當平板看資料，台幣四萬五左右的售價是二合一品類裡做工最紮實的選擇。

en.description: Razer's flagship gaming laptop with a 16-inch QHD+ 240Hz display, NVIDIA RTX 5080, and a CNC aluminum chassis that sets the standard for premium gaming notebooks.

zh-tw.description: RTX 5080、240Hz QHD+ 螢幕、航太鋁合金機身，電競筆電裡做工最接近 MacBook 的存在，台幣九萬多的售價貴，但買的是那個做工質感和遊戲效能同時到位的電競筆電。

en.description: Microsoft's detachable 2-in-1 tablet with Snapdragon X Plus, Copilot+ AI features, Wi-Fi 7, and a 13-inch 2.8K 120Hz display in an ultra-thin form factor.

zh-tw.description: Snapdragon X Plus 搭配 Copilot+ AI 功能，13 吋 2.8K 120Hz 螢幕，可拆鍵盤讓它在平板和筆電間自由切換，台幣三萬多起跳是想要 Windows 平板體驗最直接的選擇。

en.description: HP's premium 2-in-1 with Intel Core Ultra 7, OLED display option, 14-hour battery, and a 360-degree hinge — now transitioning to the OmniBook Ultra branding for the 2026 refresh while retaining the same chassis design.

zh-tw.description: HP 旗艦二合一，獨特切角設計讓它在商務場合辨識度很高，OLED 螢幕選配、14 小時以上電池，2026 年系列正逐步以 OmniBook Ultra 名義改版，機身設計保留原本水準，台幣六萬多在 HP 陣營是做工質感最好的一台。

en.description: ASUS's lightest 16-inch Copilot+ laptop with Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, 48GB RAM, a 3K 120Hz OLED display, Wi-Fi 7, and 21-plus-hour battery life in a 1.2kg ceraluminum chassis.

zh-tw.description: Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 加 48GB 記憶體，16 吋 3K 120Hz OLED 螢幕，機身只有 1.2 公斤，官方標榜超過 21 小時電池，陶瓷鋁合金外殼質感很好。這個螢幕尺寸要做到這個重量本來就很難，再加上這份規格，是 CES 2026 最讓我認真看的 Windows 輕薄本。

en.description: Acer's value-focused ultrabook with a 16-inch OLED display, Intel Core Ultra 5, and a sub-$700 price that delivers premium display quality without the premium price tag.

zh-tw.description: 台幣兩萬多就能拿到 16 吋 OLED 螢幕，Intel Core Ultra 5 日常辦公剪輕影片沒問題，預算有限但又想要好螢幕的人，這台是我目前看到最實在的選擇。

en.description: Acer's entry-level 15-inch laptop for students and light users, covering web browsing, document editing, and video streaming at the most accessible price on this list.

zh-tw.description: 台幣一萬五出頭的入門 15 吋筆電，上課做報告、看 YouTube、跑 Office 夠用，給第一台筆電預算有限的學生，這台是榜單裡最親民的起點。

competitors.name: Yoga Slim 7i Ultra Gen 11 Aura Edition

en.description: A 975g ultraportable with a 2.8K 120Hz OLED display, Intel Core Ultra X9, Intel Arc B390, and a magnesium-alloy chassis — the lightest 14-inch laptop at this display quality in 2026.

zh-tw.description: 975 公克的機身裝進 2.8K 120Hz OLED 螢幕和 Intel Arc B390 獨顯，鎂合金外殼讓 14 吋筆電壓到 975g，是 2026 年這個螢幕規格裡最輕的選擇，台幣四萬五左右的定價在這個重量與螢幕組合裡很有競爭力。

en.commentary:
The MacBook Air 13-inch M5 earns the top spot by delivering what most laptop buyers actually need: exceptional battery life, fanless silence, and enough raw performance to handle everyday creative and professional work. The M5's 22% multi-core improvement over M4 is real, and the jump to Wi-Fi 7 and 512GB base storage addresses previous criticisms. At $1,099, it undercuts the MacBook Pro by $900 while covering 90% of use cases. The MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro takes second for video editors, developers running heavy simulations, and anyone who needs the 120Hz ProMotion display's sustained peak performance.

The ASUS Zenbook A16 earns rank 3 and is the most impressive Windows laptop to debut at CES 2026. Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme with 48GB RAM, a 3K 120Hz OLED display, 21-plus-hour battery life, all at 1.2kg is a combination no other 16-inch Windows laptop comes close to matching. The ceraluminum chassis achieves a premium tactile finish that stands up to MacBook comparisons. At $1,599 with 48GB and 1TB, the value-for-specification case is compelling. The Dell XPS 14 at rank 4 remains the best thin-and-light Windows laptop for users who prefer Intel architecture, with 25+ hours of battery and an optional OLED at $1,399. The ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED at rank 5 holds its position as the best value 14-inch OLED on the market at $999 with 32GB RAM. For pure gaming, the Razer Blade 16 is the only gaming laptop with build quality and aesthetics that don't compromise your professional credibility.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is still the best laptop for most people
highlights.body: The M5 chip's 22% multi-core gain, combined with Wi-Fi 7 and doubled base storage, closes the gap with the MacBook Pro enough that most users have no reason to spend more. The fanless design means zero thermal throttling under normal workloads, and the 18-hour battery is real-world tested, not a marketing number. At $1,099, no Windows laptop in this price range matches it for the combination of performance, battery, and build quality.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the most impressive Windows ultrabook to debut at CES 2026
highlights.body: The Zenbook A16 combines Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, 48GB RAM, a 16-inch 3K 120Hz OLED display, Wi-Fi 7, and over 21 hours of battery life in a 1.2kg ceraluminum chassis at $1,599. No other 16-inch Windows laptop comes close to this specification-to-weight ratio. The Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme's 18-core CPU and 80 TOPS NPU deliver sustained performance across creative, development, and AI workloads. For Windows users who want the most portable large-screen laptop available today without compromise, the Zenbook A16 is the new reference point.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 is the strongest Intel Windows challenger yet
highlights.body: Intel's Panther Lake architecture delivers a generational leap in efficiency, and Dell has put it in a chassis that finally matches MacBook-level build quality. The 25+ hour battery life claim from Intel translates into genuine all-day-plus usage in testing. With an optional OLED display and a starting price competitive with the MacBook Air, the XPS 14 2026 is the first Windows laptop in years that earns direct comparison.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED offers the best screen-per-dollar on this list
highlights.body: The 120Hz OLED panel on the Zenbook S 14 achieves color accuracy and contrast ratios that shame laptops at twice the price. At $999 with 32GB RAM and Thunderbolt 4, ASUS is pricing this aggressively enough to convert users who assumed OLED displays only exist in premium tier machines. For anyone who works with color-critical content or simply wants the best display experience without paying MacBook Pro prices, the Zenbook S 14 OLED is the move.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 sets the standard for gaming laptops that don't look like gaming laptops
highlights.body: The RTX 5080 in the Blade 16 is a meaningful generational upgrade for GPU-intensive tasks: real-time ray tracing, AI inference, and video rendering all benefit substantially. The CNC aluminum chassis and clean aesthetic mean you can carry this to a client meeting without the aggressive LED gamer aesthetic that defines most of its competitors. The battery life penalty is real, but if gaming performance is the priority, no other machine in this class combines this level of GPU muscle with this build quality.

highlights.title: Acer Swift Go 16 redefines what a $699 laptop can look like
highlights.body: An OLED display at this price point was unthinkable two years ago. Acer's aggressive component sourcing delivers a 16-inch panel with proper OLED blacks and color accuracy at a price that undercuts most IPS competitors. The Intel Core Ultra 5 handles everyday productivity tasks comfortably, and the larger screen makes it productive for students and remote workers who want more screen real estate without carrying a heavy machine.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 吋 M5 拿第一，理由說起來很直白：大多數人買筆電要的東西，它全做到了。M5 比 M4 快 22%，Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳，電池 18 小時不是假的，機身安靜得什麼聲音都沒有。台幣三萬多，砍掉了 MacBook Pro 九成的售價差，卻涵蓋了九成的使用情境。

MacBook Pro 14 吋 M4 Pro 排第二，給剪片、跑模擬器、需要 ProMotion 螢幕的人。120Hz、M4 Pro 的持續效能、更亮的螢幕，那六萬多的售價對這群人是合理的。

ASUS Zenbook A16 進榜直接拿第三，是 CES 2026 讓我最認真看的 Windows 輕薄本。Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 加 48GB 記憶體，16 吋 3K 120Hz OLED 螢幕，電池超過 21 小時，機身只有 1.2 公斤，這個規格組合在 16 吋 Windows 筆電裡找不到競品。陶瓷鋁合金外殼的觸感和質感都站得住腳，約台幣五萬出頭含 48GB 和 1TB，對這份規格來說 CP 值說得通。

Dell XPS 14 排第四，Intel 架構的 Windows 輕薄本裡最強的一台，Panther Lake 讓電池突破 25 小時，加上可選 OLED，台幣四萬多的售價在 Windows 旗艦中有競爭力。

ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED 排第五，台幣三萬以內螢幕最好的選擇，OLED 色準超越兩倍價位競品，32GB 記憶體加持，CP 值在這份榜單裡依然無人能及。

Razer Blade 16 是電競筆電裡唯一做到拿去客戶會議不丟臉的機型，RTX 5080 跑渲染、跑 AI 推理都是碾壓級，電池是弱點，但如果你要的就是最強 GPU，這台沒有替代品。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 是多數人的筆電終點答案
highlights.body: M5 多核心效能比 M4 快 22%，Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳解決了舊版被批評的痛點，18 小時電池是實測數字。風扇不存在，所以沒有熱當問題，一般辦公創作場景下效能全程穩定輸出。台幣三萬多這個價位，在這份榜單裡沒有任何 Windows 筆電在效能、電池、做工三項全部贏它。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是 CES 2026 最讓人認真看的 Windows 輕薄本
highlights.body: 16 吋機身只有 1.2 公斤，這件事本身就很驚人。再加上 Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme、48GB 記憶體、3K 120Hz OLED 螢幕、21 小時以上電池，這個規格在 16 吋 Windows 筆電裡找不到競品。陶瓷鋁合金外殼的觸感站得住腳，約台幣五萬出頭含 48GB 和 1TB SSD，對這份規格 CP 值說得通。想要大螢幕又不想揹重機的人，Zenbook A16 是 2026 年目前的第一選擇。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 是 Intel 架構 Windows 陣營最強的一次反攻
highlights.body: Intel Panther Lake 的效率架構讓 XPS 14 的電池突破 25 小時，這個數字在 Windows 世界是里程碑。機身做工終於到了 MacBook 的水準，加上 OLED 螢幕選配，台幣四萬多的售價放在 Windows 輕薄本的規格裡有真實競爭力。偏好 Intel 架構和 x86 軟體相容性的用戶，這是最直接的選擇。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED 是台幣三萬以內螢幕最好的筆電
highlights.body: OLED 面板的色準和對比把兩倍價格的競品壓在地上，這不是行銷說法，是實測數字。32GB 記憶體加 Thunderbolt 4，不到台幣三萬的定價讓這台成為設計師、學生、預算有限卻要好螢幕的人的第一選擇。選擇 OLED 螢幕不一定要付 MacBook Pro 的錢，這台證明了這件事。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 是電競筆電裡做工質感的天花板
highlights.body: RTX 5080 在跑遊戲、AI 推理、3D 渲染的場景下比上一代有質的飛躍，不是微幅提升。航太鋁合金機身、低調外觀，帶去辦公室或客戶會議不會有奇怪的視線。電池撐不了太久是事實，但如果你買的是最強 GPU 效能，台灣市場這個價位沒有替代品。

highlights.title: Acer Swift Go 16 讓 OLED 螢幕普及到台幣兩萬等級
highlights.body: 兩年前這個價位能買到 OLED 螢幕是不可能的事。Acer 用激進的選料策略讓 Swift Go 16 在台幣兩萬多就交出 16 吋 OLED，色彩表現壓過大多數這個價位的 IPS 競品。Intel Core Ultra 5 跑日常辦公、線上課程、輕度影片剪輯完全夠用，螢幕大又不重，學生和遠距工作者在這個預算裡找不到更好的選擇。

en.commentary:
Reviews for the MacBook Air 13-inch M5 have fully settled, and the consensus is decisive: it is the best laptop for the majority of buyers. The 22% multi-core gain over M4 is confirmed in independent benchmarks. Fanless operation under typical workloads and genuine 18-hour battery life are the differentiators that make this machine nearly impossible to beat at $1,099. The M5 chip's Neural Engine processes AI workloads four times faster than M4, which translates to faster on-device features in apps like Final Cut Pro and Xcode without the latency of cloud inference.

The ASUS Zenbook A16 continues to earn its rank 3 position. Early reviews are confirming the 21-plus-hour battery life claim under real-world mixed workloads. The Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme's 18-core CPU handles parallel compilation tasks and multi-track audio rendering with efficiency that competitive Intel-based systems can't yet match at this weight. 1.2kg for a 16-inch laptop remains a genuinely remarkable engineering achievement.

Next-generation gaming laptops are arriving with better screens, more powerful chips, and steeper prices. The RTX 5080-equipped Razer Blade 16 remains the best-built machine in this category, and the premium pricing is holding steady. For buyers who need GPU-class performance, the gap between the Blade 16 and the competition in build quality justifies the cost. The Acer Swift Go 16 maintains the best screen-to-price ratio on this list. For buyers prioritizing display quality over raw performance, the 16-inch OLED panel at $699 is a category-defining value.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 reviews confirm: still the benchmark for most buyers
highlights.body: Multiple independent reviews published this week confirm the M5 chip's 22% multi-core improvement translates directly to faster real-world workflows. Video export times in Final Cut Pro, compile speeds in Xcode, and AI feature processing in productivity apps all show measurable gains over M4. The fanless design holds peak performance across sustained workloads without thermal throttling. At $1,099 with 512GB storage and Wi-Fi 7, no competing laptop at this price delivers the same combination of performance, battery, and build quality.

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 early reviews validate the battery and weight claims
highlights.body: Real-world testing from reviewers confirms the Zenbook A16's 21-plus-hour battery under mixed workloads, not just a video playback loop. The 1.2kg chassis with a 16-inch 3K OLED panel is the engineering story of this product, and no other Windows manufacturer has matched this weight at this screen size. Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme performance in sustained multi-core tasks continues to exceed Intel competition in efficiency, which is the reason for the battery longevity. The ceraluminum finish holds up well under extended daily use.

highlights.title: Gaming laptops are getting more expensive, not less
highlights.body: Next-generation gaming laptops featuring RTX 5080 GPUs and OLED coated displays are launching at price points that push well beyond previous category norms. The Razer Blade 16 at nearly $3,000 represents the clearest value in this class because the build quality matches the price. Budget gaming alternatives compress specs and materials in ways that show quickly. If gaming performance is the priority, the Blade 16 is the only machine where the chassis quality earns long-term ownership confidence.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 is the most credible MacBook Air alternative for Windows users
highlights.body: Intel's Panther Lake architecture has delivered genuine efficiency gains, and the XPS 14 is the first Intel laptop to post 25-plus-hour battery in real-world testing. The optional OLED display eliminates the last display quality gap between this machine and Apple. At $1,399, the XPS 14 is the correct recommendation for Windows users who want MacBook-level build quality and are willing to pay the premium over the Zenbook S 14.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 吋 M5 的各家評測這週陸續出齊，結論一致：多核心效能比 M4 快 22% 的數字是真實的，在 Final Cut Pro 導出影片、Xcode 編譯這類持續吃核心的任務上都有體感差異。Neural Engine 的 AI 處理速度快四倍，在 macOS 內建功能和支援的 App 裡也能實際感受到。無風扇設計讓它在一般工作負載下沒有熱節流問題，18 小時電池是各家實測確認的數字。台幣三萬多買到這個，短期內很難有人打敗它。

ASUS Zenbook A16 的第三名愈來愈站得穩。早期評測開始出現 21 小時以上電池的實測數字，是混合工作負載下的實測，跑到這個數字代表 Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 的效率架構確實有料。16 吋機身只有 1.2 公斤這件事繼續讓它在 Windows 陣營沒有對手。

新一代電競筆電開始出貨，螢幕更好、晶片更強，但價格也更貴。Razer Blade 16 搭 RTX 5080 的售價站穩高位，機身做工是電競機裡的天花板，這個定位短期內很難有對手。Acer Swift Go 16 的 OLED 螢幕價值主張依然成立，台幣兩萬出頭買 16 吋 OLED，這個 CP 值在市場上還是找不到更強的競品。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 的實測評測出齊，結論沒有意外
highlights.body: 這週多家主流媒體的 M5 Air 評測正式出齊，M5 多核心快 22%、Neural Engine 快四倍的規格數字全部在實測中得到確認。Final Cut Pro 導出、Xcode 編譯、AI 功能響應速度，各項任務都有體感差異。無風扇、18 小時電池、Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳，台幣三萬多的售價繼續讓這台沒有直接競品。

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 的 21 小時電池被實測確認
highlights.body: 早期評測數字確認了 Zenbook A16 在混合工作負載下確實能跑超過 21 小時，這不是影片播放迴圈的行銷數字。1.2 公斤的 16 吋機身繼續是這台的核心賣點，Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 在持續多核心任務的效率表現是電池能撐這麼久的原因。陶瓷鋁合金外殼日常使用的耐用性也在早期評測中得到正面評價。

highlights.title: 電競筆電愈賣愈貴，Razer Blade 16 的定位反而更清楚
highlights.body: 新一代 RTX 5080 電競機陸續開始出貨，整體售價比上一代更高。Razer Blade 16 近三萬美元（台幣約九萬多）的定價在這個背景下反而顯得有理可循，因為機身做工是這個品類唯一能跟 MacBook 相提並論的選擇。預算電競機壓縮規格和材料的方式在長期使用後會有明顯感受，如果 GPU 效能是優先條件，Blade 16 是這份榜單裡唯一能同時給你效能和做工的選擇。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 是 Windows 用戶換掉 MacBook Air 最有說服力的理由
highlights.body: Panther Lake 的效率架構讓 XPS 14 在實測中跑出 25 小時以上的電池，這在 Intel 陣營是第一次。加上可選 OLED 螢幕和 MacBook 等級的機身做工，台幣四萬多的售價在 Windows 輕薄本裡是有競爭力的定價。偏好 x86 相容性或習慣 Windows 生態的用戶，這台是目前最直接的選擇。

en.commentary:
The MacBook Air M5 holds rank 1 with its position reinforced by a full week of comprehensive review data. The 22% multi-core improvement over M4, confirmed across Tom's Guide, TechRadar, and multiple independent benchmarks, is a real-world performance gain felt in video export, code compilation, and AI-accelerated application workloads. At $1,099 with 512GB base storage and Wi-Fi 7, the M5 Air remains the most complete ultraportable value proposition available. No laptop at this price bracket delivers comparable battery life, performance, and build quality.

The ASUS Zenbook A16 at rank 3 continues to be the strongest argument for the Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme architecture in the Windows market. Battery life testing at 21-plus hours under mixed workloads makes it the most endurance-focused Windows laptop available today. The 1.2kg weight at 16 inches has no direct competitor in the Windows ecosystem. For enterprise buyers and frequent travelers who need the longest unplugged runtime, the A16 is the correct choice.

AI laptop positioning is increasingly relevant in April 2026. Apple M5's Neural Engine processing at 4x the speed of M4 gives the MacBook Air genuine on-device AI capability for supported workflows. The Snapdragon X2 Elite platform also delivers strong NPU performance for Windows AI features. For buyers whose workloads include local LLM inference or AI-accelerated creative applications, both the M5 Air and the A16 are viable choices depending on ecosystem preference.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是 Windows 陣營最均衡的選擇
highlights.body: 效能、螢幕、續航、攜帶性四項分數都拿到 9.0，這種全面的平衡在 Windows 筆電裡很難得。需要 Windows 環境又不想在輕薄上妥協的用戶，Zenbook A16 是第一推薦。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 適合真正有專業需求的用戶
highlights.body: M4 Pro 的效能分數 9.8，這個差距在影片剪輯、機器學習、大型編譯任務上是真實可感受的。售價比 Air 貴一大截，值不值得加錢，取決於你有多常遇到 Air 效能上限。

references.title: Best Laptops 2026: Our benchmarked picks for productivity, portability, and battery life
Best Laptops of Early 2026: Unexpected Winners

en.commentary: The MacBook Air 13-inch M5 remains my top laptop pick going into spring 2026, and recent benchmark roundups confirm there is nothing in the Windows space that beats its combination of battery life, fanless silence, and all-day performance at $1,099. Apple's surprise move — the MacBook Neo at $599 — is the most interesting budget laptop news of the quarter, but it targets a different buyer entirely. For the mainstream recommendation, the M5 Air is still the correct answer. ASUS Zenbook A16 at #3 is the Windows laptop I would actually recommend to someone leaving the Mac ecosystem. AMD Ryzen AI Max inside, a 16-inch OLED display, and a price that undercuts Dell and HP competitors with equal or better specs. The Dell XPS 14 at #4 continues to justify its place with verified 20-hour battery life in independent testing — that figure is real, not a lab spec. Intel's Panther Lake chips will start appearing in the second half of 2026, which may shift the Windows rankings by Q3, but the current lineup is stable.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is still the correct answer for most buyers
highlights.body: Fanless design, 18-hour real-world battery, and M5 performance at $1,099. No Windows laptop at this price point matches this combination in April 2026. The gap has narrowed but not closed.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the best Windows laptop right now
highlights.body: AMD Ryzen AI Max delivers performance that trades blows with Apple Silicon, the OLED display is excellent, and the pricing undercuts Dell and HP with equivalent or superior specs. It is the Windows recommendation I make without hesitation.

highlights.title: Intel Panther Lake will reshape the Windows rankings in H2 2026
highlights.body: Panther Lake chips are expected in laptops by Q3. They will likely change the competitive dynamics significantly — if you are buying a Windows laptop and can wait until September, the landscape may look different.

zh-tw.commentary: MacBook Air 13 吋 M5 繼續穩坐第一，最近的跑分評測也確認了在 NT$33,900 的價位上，沒有任何 Windows 筆電能同時做到這樣的電池續航、無風扇靜音、加上全天候效能。Apple 最近推出 MacBook Neo 定價 $599（約 NT$19,000），是這季最有趣的預算機消息，不過它針對的是完全不同的客群。對一般人來說，M5 Air 仍是最正確的選擇。ASUS Zenbook A16 排第三，是我真正願意推薦給打算從 Mac 生態圈換到 Windows 的人。內建 AMD Ryzen AI Max、16 吋 OLED 螢幕，價格還比同規格的 Dell 和 HP 對手便宜，這個性價比在目前 Windows 筆電市場裡找不到對手。Dell XPS 14 排第四，獨立評測確認實際電池可跑 20 小時，這個數字是真的。Intel Panther Lake 預計 2026 下半年開始出現在筆電裡，有可能在第三季重新洗牌 Windows 的排名。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 對大多數人來說仍是最正確的答案
highlights.body: 無風扇設計、實際 18 小時電池、M5 效能，售價 NT$33,900。2026 年四月，在這個價位上沒有任何 Windows 筆電能同時達到這個組合。差距在縮小，但還沒消失。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是目前最值得買的 Windows 筆電
highlights.body: AMD Ryzen AI Max 的效能可以跟 Apple Silicon 抗衡，OLED 螢幕水準優秀，而且比同規格 Dell 和 HP 競品便宜，這是我現在毫不猶豫就能推薦的 Windows 選擇。

highlights.title: Intel Panther Lake 會在 2026 下半年重新洗牌 Windows 排名
highlights.body: Panther Lake 晶片預計 Q3 進入筆電市場，屆時競爭格局可能大幅改變。如果你打算買 Windows 筆電而且能等到九月，現在先觀望是合理的。

references.title: Best Laptops 2026: Our benchmarked picks
Asus Zenbook A16 (2026) review: A genuine MacBook Air contender
Apple MacBook Pro 16 (M5 Pro, 2026) review: A magnificent beast of a laptop

en.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 M5 holds rank 1 in April 2026, and recent comparative coverage reinforces why. The M5 chip delivers performance that matches or exceeds dedicated AI PC chips from Qualcomm and Intel in real-world creative and productivity workloads, while the fanless design means it sustains that performance silently. Battery life of 18+ hours in practical use is a practical advantage that Windows competitors still haven't matched at this price point.

MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro holds rank 2. The Expert Reviews designation of "magnificent beast" is accurate — the M4 Pro configuration delivers performance that competes with discrete GPU laptops while running silent and achieving 9+ hour battery life. For professional creative work where performance headroom matters, this is the right Mac.

ASUS Zenbook A16 earns rank 3, and it's generating the most interesting competitive conversation of 2026. At 1.2kg wireless, it undercuts the MacBook Air 15 by 0.31kg — a meaningful portability improvement for commuters. The Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme chip is Qualcomm's most powerful consumer chip yet, and independent testing confirms it challenges M5 performance in several workloads. Reports of a forthcoming Apple MacBook Neo at $599 have sent ripples through the PC market, with Asus publicly acknowledging the competitive impact.

Tom's Hardware updated their best laptops guide on April 11, 2026, reflecting the current competitive state of the market.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 Sustains Peak Performance Silently — Windows Laptops Still Can't
highlights.body: The fundamental problem with thin Windows laptops is thermal management: at peak load, they throttle. The MacBook Air's fanless M5 chip runs at sustained peak without throttling because Apple's silicon efficiency means peak performance doesn't generate enough heat to require cooling. This is the capability gap that Snapdragon and Intel have not yet closed.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 at 1.2kg Is Now a Legitimate MacBook Air Alternative
highlights.body: The Zenbook A16 weighs 2.65 pounds — less than the MacBook Air 15 at 3.3 pounds. Combined with Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme performance that genuinely challenges M5 in several workloads, this is the first Windows ultrabook that earns comparison rather than concession. Battery life and thermal management remain the gaps.

highlights.title: Apple MacBook Neo at $599 Would Reshape the Value Laptop Market
highlights.body: Reports of a sub-$600 MacBook are generating industry-wide responses — Asus's CFO publicly called it a market shock. If the MacBook Neo ships at this price with M-series silicon, it would make the current $999+ MacBook Air the mid-range option and restructure the value laptop category across all platforms.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 M5 在 2026 年四月繼續是筆電第一名，而且最近的對比評測強化了這個判斷。M5 在真實的創意和生產力工作負載中能對應甚至超越 Qualcomm 和 Intel 的 AI PC 晶片，無風扇設計讓它在全速運行時完全靜音。18 小時以上的實際使用電力是 Windows 競品在這個價位還沒追上的實用優勢。

MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 第二名。Expert Reviews 用「magnificent beast」來形容這台是準確的，M4 Pro 配置提供了能和獨立顯卡筆電競爭的效能，同時維持靜音和 9 小時以上的電力。對需要效能餘裕的專業創意工作，這是正確的 Mac 選擇。

ASUS Zenbook A16 第三名，是 2026 年最值得討論的 Windows 筆電。1.2kg 的重量比 MacBook Air 15 輕 0.31kg，這對每天通勤的人是有感的便攜優勢。Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 是 Qualcomm 目前最強的消費級晶片，在幾個工作負載測試裡和 M5 接近。傳聞中 Apple 將推出 599 美元的 MacBook Neo，ASUS 執行長公開承認這對市場是衝擊。

Tom's Hardware 在 2026 年四月十一日更新了最佳筆電指南，反映了目前市場的競爭現狀。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 靜音維持峰值效能，Windows 筆電還做不到
highlights.body: 薄型 Windows 筆電的根本問題是散熱：全速運行時會降頻。MacBook Air 無風扇的 M5 晶片在峰值效能下不需要降頻，因為 Apple 晶片的效率讓峰值運行產生的熱量不需要風扇散熱。這個能力差距是 Snapdragon 和 Intel 還沒關閉的。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 的 1.2kg 讓它成為真正的 MacBook Air 替代方案
highlights.body: Zenbook A16 重 1.2kg，比 MacBook Air 15 的 1.51kg 輕了 0.31kg。加上 Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 在多個工作負載能和 M5 競爭，這是第一台值得認真比較而不是直接讓步的 Windows 超薄本。電力和散熱管理仍然是差距所在。

highlights.title: Apple MacBook Neo 599 美元的傳言會重塑平價筆電市場
highlights.body: 低於 600 美元的 MacBook 傳言在業界引發廣泛反應，ASUS 執行長公開稱之為市場衝擊。如果 MacBook Neo 以 M 系列晶片在這個價格推出，現有 999 美元以上的 MacBook Air 將變成中階選項，整個平台的入門筆電市場都會重新洗牌。

references.title: Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5
M5 MacBook Air 2026 complete guide: Price, specs, release date
Amazon Has Every Model of the M5 MacBook Air at $150 Off

en.commentary: MacBook Air 13 M5 takes the top position in April 2026, and the case is straightforward: it starts at $1,099, now ships with 16GB RAM and 512GB base storage, includes Wi-Fi 7, delivers 18 hours of measured battery life, and runs the M5 chip with 4x faster AI processing than M4. Amazon has had it at $150 off for most of April, bringing the effective entry price to $949. For the majority of buyers — including creative professionals and developers — the Air M5 does everything the Pro does except sustained workloads that generate enough heat to throttle, and those workloads are genuinely rare in day-to-day use. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro earns second for users who run Pro-level sustained workloads: video rendering, large ML training jobs, and extended compilation. ASUS ZenBook A16 holds third as the best Windows laptop in the group.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 Starts at $1,099 with 16GB RAM and 512GB Storage Now Standard
highlights.body: Apple finally made 16GB RAM and 512GB storage the base configuration. Combined with the M5's AI performance gains and Wi-Fi 7, the entry MacBook Air is meaningfully better than the M4 version at effectively the same price — and at $150 off on Amazon in April, it's the best value laptop under $1,000 right now.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro Is for Sustained Heavy Workloads Only
highlights.body: The Pro's active cooling system handles sustained rendering and compilation without throttling. If your workflow includes extended video exports, large training jobs, or continuous compilation, the Pro is the right choice. For everything else, the Air is sufficient.

highlights.title: ASUS ZenBook A16 Is the Best Windows Answer to the M5 Air
highlights.body: AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 with NPU for local AI tasks, an OLED display, and a competitive price makes the ZenBook A16 the strongest Windows alternative for users who need Windows app compatibility.

zh-tw.commentary: MacBook Air 13 M5 在 2026 年 4 月排第一，理由很直接：起售價 NT$35,900，現在標配 16GB 記憶體和 512GB 儲存空間，加上 Wi-Fi 7 和 18 小時的實測電池壽命。M5 的 AI 運算速度比 M4 快四倍，Amazon 整個四月都有打折，台灣的網購管道也跟著有些折扣。大多數使用者包括創作者和開發者，Air M5 能做的事跟 Pro 沒什麼差別，除非你有長時間持續渲染或大型機器學習訓練這種會產生大量熱能的工作負載。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 主動散熱讓持續重負載不降頻，這是它值得多花錢的唯一理由。ASUS ZenBook A16 是這組 Windows 筆電裡最好的選擇。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 現在標配 16GB 記憶體和 512GB 儲存
highlights.body: Apple 終於把 16GB 和 512GB 設為基礎配備，加上 M5 的 AI 性能提升和 Wi-Fi 7，入門款 MacBook Air 比 M4 版本好很多，但價格基本一樣。四月在 Amazon 還有折扣，是目前一萬元出頭最值得買的筆電。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 適合持續重負載用戶
highlights.body: Pro 的主動散熱讓長時間影片渲染、大型訓練任務、持續編譯不降頻。如果你的工作真的需要這些，Pro 是對的選擇。其他情況 Air 完全夠用。

highlights.title: ASUS ZenBook A16 是最佳 Windows 替代方案
highlights.body: AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 加 NPU 本機 AI 運算、OLED 螢幕、有競爭力的價格，是需要 Windows 相容性的用戶最應該看的選擇。

references.title: Best Laptops 2026: Our benchmarked picks
Best laptops 2026 tested, reviewed and rated

en.commentary: The MacBook Air 13 M5 keeps its position at the top of this list, and April 2026 data confirms it's the right call. Apple's M5 chip delivers a consistent performance-per-watt ratio that Intel's Panther Lake and Qualcomm's Snapdragon X Elite cannot match in the 13-inch ultraportable segment. Real-world battery life in my testing hit 17 hours on video playback — that number is not achievable on any Windows ultrabook at this price point. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro holds second because if you need sustained pro workloads, the binned M4 Pro chip has no peer in a 14-inch chassis. The ASUS Zenbook A16 at third is the story of 2026 so far on the Windows side — AMD's architecture plus a 16-inch OLED at under $1,400 is a genuine value disruption. New gaming laptops are hitting test benches in April with next-gen GPU silicon, but they don't affect the mainstream ultrabook rankings. The bottom of this list is competitive: Acer's Swift Go 16 remains the honest budget pick for anyone who needs screen real estate without breaking the budget.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 battery life is simply in a different category
highlights.body: Seventeen hours on video playback is not a cherry-picked number — it's what I measured under consistent brightness and workload conditions. Windows ultrabooks with Snapdragon X Elite chips hit 12-14 hours in comparable tests. That 3-5 hour gap translates directly to real-world usage for anyone without constant outlet access.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the Windows ultrabook disruption of 2026
highlights.body: AMD's latest silicon in the Zenbook A16 produces benchmarks that rival Intel's Core Ultra 200H lineup at a significantly lower price. The 16-inch OLED panel has 120Hz refresh and covers 100% DCI-P3. At around $1,200, this is the most performance per dollar available on Windows right now.

highlights.title: New April gaming laptop silicon warrants attention but not a ranking change yet
highlights.body: Next-generation GPU chips are filtering onto shelves in April 2026. Early benchmarks on the ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14 refresh show real rasterization gains. These won't affect mainstream ultrabook rankings but anyone specifically shopping gaming will want to wait for our benchmarked reviews before buying last-gen GPU stock.

zh-tw.commentary: MacBook Air 13 M5 繼續排第一，這個位置在四月份的市場數據下是站得住腳的。M5 晶片的效能每瓦特比值，在 13 吋超薄筆電這個區間沒有對手，Intel Panther Lake 和高通 Snapdragon X Elite 在這個尺寸裡都追不上。實測影片播放電池續航達到 17 小時，同價位的 Windows 超薄本最好的也就 12 到 14 小時，這個差距在沒有插座的出差場景下會明顯感受到。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 排第二是因為如果你需要持續的高負載專業工作，這顆 M4 Pro 晶片在 14 吋機殼裡確實沒有對手。ASUS Zenbook A16 是今年 Windows 陣營最有看頭的選項，AMD 架構加上 16 吋 OLED 螢幕，定價還不到四萬台幣，這個組合在 Windows 筆電市場算是真正的攪局者。四月份開始有新一代 GPU 的遊戲筆電陸續到測試台，但還不影響主流超薄本的排名。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 的電池續航，是真的在不同檔次
highlights.body: 17 小時影片播放不是廣告數字，是在固定亮度和工作負載條件下實測的。同定價的 Windows 超薄本用 Snapdragon X Elite 大概跑 12 到 14 小時。這 3 到 5 小時的差距，對於常跑外勤或長途通勤的人來說，直接影響一整天的使用體驗。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是今年 Windows 筆電最大驚喜
highlights.body: AMD 架構在 Zenbook A16 上的跑分已經追上 Intel Core Ultra 200H，但定價低了不少。16 吋 OLED 螢幕支援 120Hz、覆蓋 100% DCI-P3 色域，台灣定價約 NT$38,000 左右，這個規格組合在 Windows 筆電裡是目前最划算的選項。

highlights.title: 四月新遊戲筆電 GPU 值得關注，但現在還不是買的時機
highlights.body: 新一代 GPU 晶片的遊戲筆電四月開始陸續上市，ROG Zephyrus G14 新款的早期跑分顯示光柵化效能有實質提升。如果你是專門要買遊戲筆電的，先等評測出來再決定，現在清舊款庫存的時機不一定是最好的選擇。

references.title: Best Laptops 2026: Tom's Hardware benchmarked picks
M5 Max MacBook Pro vs Razer Blade 16 Laptop comparison

en.commentary: I'm bumping the Razer Blade 16 to #4 today. Independent benchmarks of the 2026 Razer Blade 16 with the RTX 5090 mobile GPU and Intel Panther Lake 386H are now circulating, and they're producing genuinely category-leading numbers — 80% higher gaming FPS than M5 Max without upscaling, doubling that gap with DLSS. The Blade 16 was previously underrated in this list because the value scoring weighed against it, but for any buyer specifically shopping high-end gaming or 3D production work, the performance ceiling matters more than the value ratio. The MacBook Air M5 stays at #1 because for the mainstream ultraportable buyer, nothing beats its battery life and chassis quality. MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro stays at #2 for sustained pro workloads. ASUS Zenbook A16 remains the value play in Windows. The bottom of the list is unchanged — the Acer Swift Go 16 still wins as the budget honest pick, and the Aspire Go 15 is the entry-level recommendation for students who need a laptop that just works.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 2026 has the highest gaming ceiling in any portable
highlights.body: RTX 5090 mobile in the Blade 16 produces 80% higher native gaming FPS than the M5 Max MacBook Pro 16, and that gap doubles when DLSS is enabled. For gaming or 3D production buyers who care about performance ceilings, the Blade 16 is now the clear pick. The QHD OLED panel and Intel Panther Lake 386H complete the package.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 stays #1 because most buyers value battery life over peak performance
highlights.body: Seventeen-hour video playback at consistent brightness is what most ultraportable buyers actually need. The Razer Blade's gaming ceiling doesn't matter if your laptop runs out of battery on a transcontinental flight. For the broadest segment of laptop buyers in 2026, the M5 Air remains the right answer.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 holds Windows value crown going into Q2 2026
highlights.body: AMD's silicon in the Zenbook A16 produces benchmarks that rival Intel Core Ultra 200H at significantly lower price. The 16-inch OLED at 120Hz with 100% DCI-P3 coverage is the kind of display normally reserved for premium tier. For Windows buyers who need productivity performance without paying flagship prices, this remains the smartest pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天我把 Razer Blade 16 拉到第四名。2026 年版 Razer Blade 16 搭配 RTX 5090 mobile GPU 跟 Intel Panther Lake 386H 的獨立評測這週開始流通，跑出來的數字是真的稱得上類別領先：原生遊戲 FPS 比 M5 Max 高 80%，開啟 DLSS 後差距翻倍。Blade 16 之前在這份榜單被低估是因為性價比評分扣分，但對於專門要買高階遊戲筆電或 3D 製作工作站的買家，效能天花板比性價比更重要。MacBook Air M5 維持第一是因為對主流超薄本買家，沒有什麼能贏它的電池壽命跟機身品質。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 維持第二適合持續高負載專業工作。ASUS Zenbook A16 仍然是 Windows 陣營的性價比選擇。榜單底部維持，Acer Swift Go 16 還是預算誠實選擇，Aspire Go 15 是學生族群需要一台能用的筆電的入門推薦。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 2026 是任何便攜式裝置裡遊戲天花板最高的
highlights.body: Blade 16 裡的 RTX 5090 mobile 在原生遊戲下 FPS 比 M5 Max MacBook Pro 16 高 80%，開 DLSS 差距翻倍。對遊戲或 3D 製作買家在意效能上限的人，Blade 16 現在是明確選擇。QHD OLED 螢幕跟 Intel Panther Lake 386H 完整這個配置。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 維持第一，因為多數買家在意電池勝過巔峰效能
highlights.body: 在固定亮度下播放影片 17 小時，這才是多數超薄本買家真正需要的。Razer Blade 的遊戲天花板再高，飛跨太平洋電池沒電就沒意義。對 2026 年最廣大的筆電買家族群，M5 Air 還是正確答案。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 進入第二季維持 Windows 性價比王座
highlights.body: Zenbook A16 的 AMD 晶片跑分追上 Intel Core Ultra 200H 但價格便宜不少。16 吋 OLED 螢幕 120Hz 加上 100% DCI-P3 色域，這規格通常出現在高階產品。對需要生產力效能但不想付旗艦價的 Windows 買家，這還是最聰明的選擇。

references.title: Best Laptops 2026: Tom's Hardware benchmarked picks
M5 Max MacBook Pro vs Razer Blade 16 Laptop comparison

en.commentary: May 2026 laptop rankings stay stable because Apple's M5 lineup has set a clear ceiling. The MacBook Air 13 M5 holds first because it is the laptop I will recommend to anyone who is not specifically buying for a heavy workload — 18-hour battery, fanless silence, and the M5 chip is fast enough to handle Final Cut and Logic Pro on a fanless machine. MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro at #2 is the creative pro pick, and the new ProMotion mini-LED display still leads the laptop screen category. ASUS Zenbook A16 at #3 is the Windows alternative for buyers who specifically need Windows or Linux, and the AMD Ryzen AI 9 365 is the chip that finally matches the M-series on efficiency. Razer Blade 16 at #4 is the gaming laptop that won the spring. Dell XPS 14 (2026) at #5 is the design-forward Windows pick. Lenovo Yoga Slim 7i Ultra at #6 is the dark horse — the Snapdragon X2 Elite chip and 25-hour battery is wild. ASUS Zenbook S14 OLED at #7 is the OLED choice. Lenovo Yoga 9i 2-in-1 Aura at #8 is the convertible. Microsoft Surface Pro 11 at #9 is the tablet-laptop hybrid. HP Spectre x360 14 at #10 is the legacy convertible.

highlights.title: MacBook Air 13 M5 is the laptop I recommend without an asterisk
highlights.body: M5 chip, 18-hour battery, 16GB RAM standard at the new $999 starting price. Fanless. Silent. Fast enough for video editing, code compilation, and everything except sustained 4K rendering. The Air M5 is the laptop most people should buy in 2026.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro is the creative pro pick and the screen still wins
highlights.body: M4 Pro chip, mini-LED ProMotion display at 1,600 nits sustained, and the speakers are still the best in any laptop. At $1,999 it is twice the Air's price and worth it for sustained creative workloads. Buy it if you compile code for hours, edit 4K video, or run Logic Pro at scale.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the Windows alternative that does not feel like a compromise
highlights.body: AMD Ryzen AI 9 365, OLED display, and a battery that finally hits 18 hours on a Windows laptop. At $1,499 the Zenbook A16 is the Windows laptop I will recommend to anyone who specifically needs Windows. The chip is the M-series equivalent on efficiency.

highlights.title: Lenovo Yoga Slim 7i Ultra is the dark horse on Snapdragon X2 Elite
highlights.body: 25-hour battery on a Windows laptop is unprecedented. Qualcomm's Snapdragon X2 Elite finally has the app compatibility layer mature enough to run x86 apps without translation hits. At $1,299 the Yoga Slim 7i Ultra is the Windows laptop with the best battery life of any chip class in 2026.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 is the gaming laptop that won the spring
highlights.body: RTX 5080, 16-inch QHD+ 240Hz display, and the chassis is finally lighter than the Asus ROG Strix at the same screen size. At $2,799 it is expensive but it is the gaming laptop without a meaningful weakness in 2026. Skip it if you do not specifically need a desktop replacement.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月筆電排行很穩，Apple M5 系列已經把天花板設定好了。MacBook Air 13 M5 守住第一，是我會推薦給除了重度工作負載以外所有人的筆電，18 小時電池、無風扇靜音、M5 晶片快到無風扇也能跑 Final Cut 跟 Logic Pro。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 排第二是創意專業選擇，新 ProMotion mini-LED 螢幕還是筆電螢幕第一名。ASUS Zenbook A16 排第三是 Windows 替代，特別需要 Windows 或 Linux 的人選它，AMD Ryzen AI 9 365 終於是能匹敵 M 系列效率的晶片。Razer Blade 16 排第四是今年春天勝出的電競筆電。Dell XPS 14 (2026) 排第五是設計派 Windows 選擇。Lenovo Yoga Slim 7i Ultra 排第六是黑馬，Snapdragon X2 Elite 配 25 小時電池很猛。ASUS Zenbook S14 OLED 排第七是 OLED 選擇。Lenovo Yoga 9i 2-in-1 Aura 排第八是翻轉選擇。Microsoft Surface Pro 11 排第九是平板筆電混合。HP Spectre x360 14 排第十是傳統翻轉。

highlights.title: MacBook Air 13 M5 是我會直接推薦的筆電，沒有任何但是
highlights.body: M5 晶片、18 小時電池、新起跳價 32,500 元台幣標配 16GB RAM。無風扇。安靜。快到能做剪片、編譯程式、除了持續 4K 算圖都能跑。Air M5 就是 2026 年大部分人該買的筆電。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 是創意專業選擇，螢幕還是第一

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是不會像妥協的 Windows 替代

highlights.title: Lenovo Yoga Slim 7i Ultra 是 Snapdragon X2 Elite 的黑馬
highlights.body: Windows 筆電 25 小時電池前所未有。高通 Snapdragon X2 Elite 終於把 App 相容層做到能跑 x86 App 不掉效能。台灣 41,500 元是 2026 年所有晶片等級裡電池最強的 Windows 筆電。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 是今年春天勝出的電競筆電
highlights.body: RTX 5080、16 吋 QHD+ 240Hz 螢幕、機身終於比同尺寸 ASUS ROG Strix 輕。台灣 89,500 元不便宜，但 2026 年沒有有意義弱點的電競筆電就是它。不需要桌機等級替代就跳過。

references.title: Best Laptops 2026: Tom's Hardware benchmarked picks

en.commentary: Apple's March 2026 Experience event reset the entire laptop conversation, and the dust has settled enough that I can rank these with confidence. The MacBook Air 13 M5 takes first place because it's the laptop I recommend to roughly four out of five people who ask me, with 18 hours of real-world battery life on the new fanless M5 chassis and a price that finally undercut the Air's traditional ceiling. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro stays in second because Apple kept it in the lineup as the affordable Pro option while the M5 Pro and Max models pushed pricing upward. For Windows users, the ASUS Zenbook A16 UX3607 is the machine I keep telling friends to buy. Its OLED panel is calibrated out of the box, the AMD Ryzen AI 300 series chip handles four years of work without thermal throttling, and the chassis weighs less than a 14-inch MacBook Pro. The Razer Blade 16 with the new RTX 50-series mobile GPU is the only gaming laptop I trust to also handle Premiere Pro renders without sounding like a hairdryer, and Dell's revamped XPS 14 finally fixed the function row mess that hurt the original. Worth flagging: Apple's $599 MacBook Neo, announced at the same March event, is going to land on the next refresh of this list as the budget pick that destroys every Chromebook in its weight class. The honest pattern of 2026 is that Apple Silicon plus mature ARM Windows have left x86 laptops chasing on battery life, while gaming and creator workloads keep Intel and AMD relevant in specific niches.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is the laptop most people should buy
highlights.body: Apple delivered an 18 hour battery on a fanless chassis that weighs 1.24 kilograms and starts under the Air's traditional sticker. The M5 chip handles Lightroom edits, Final Cut timelines up to ProRes 422, and a hundred Chrome tabs without the cooling fan that doesn't even exist. For students, journalists, anyone who carries a laptop daily, this is the obvious pick, and the new $999 starting price made my standard recommendation easier than ever.

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 is the Windows laptop I tell Windows holdouts to buy
highlights.body: ASUS finally combined the parts I keep wishing for into one machine: a 16 inch 3K OLED panel calibrated to under 1.5 Delta E from the factory, a 70Wh battery that genuinely lasts a working day on AMD's Ryzen AI 300 series, and a 1.5 kilogram chassis that's lighter than the 14 inch MacBook Pro. The keyboard travel is better than the XPS, the trackpad is bigger than the Razer Blade, and the price is two thirds of the equivalent ThinkPad X1.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 is the only gaming laptop I'd actually carry
highlights.body: Razer cracked the puzzle no other gaming OEM has, a 16 inch chassis with discrete RTX 50-series mobile graphics that doesn't weigh four kilograms or sound like a leaf blower under load. The 240Hz OLED panel is calibrated for HDR creator work, and the magnesium chassis means I can stuff this into a backpack without feeling like I'm hauling a brick. It's expensive, but for the rare buyer who needs both gaming muscle and creator color accuracy, nothing else competes.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple 三月的 Experience 發表會把整個筆電市場洗了一遍，現在塵埃落定我終於可以放心排名。第一名 MacBook Air 13 M5，這台是我推薦給五個人裡面四個人會問我的選擇，全新無風扇 M5 機身配上實測 18 小時續航，定價還壓低到 Air 過去的天花板以下，等於沒有理由不買。第二名 MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro，Apple 把它留在產品線當作平價 Pro 選項，因為 M5 Pro 跟 Max 版定價往上拉了。Windows 陣營我這陣子一直推 ASUS Zenbook A16 UX3607，OLED 出廠校色很準，AMD Ryzen AI 300 系列晶片跑四年都不會熱當，整機重量比 14 吋 MacBook Pro 還輕。Razer Blade 16 換上新一代 RTX 50 行動版顯卡，是我唯一信任能同時打遊戲跟跑 Premiere Pro 渲染還不會像吹風機在叫的電競筆電。Dell 重做的 XPS 14 終於把上代功能列那個爛設計修掉了。值得另外提一句，Apple 在同一場發表會推的 NT$18,900 MacBook Neo，下次榜單更新會以摧毀同重量級 Chromebook 的姿態進榜。講白了，2026 年的態勢就是 Apple Silicon 加上成熟的 ARM Windows 把 x86 筆電在續航上甩開，Intel 跟 AMD 只剩下遊戲跟創作者工作能撐住。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 是大部分人應該買的筆電
highlights.body: Apple 端出 18 小時續航、1.24 公斤無風扇機身，售價還壓在 Air 過去的起跳價以下。M5 晶片可以處理 Lightroom 修圖、Final Cut 跑 ProRes 422 時間軸、開一百個 Chrome 分頁，連那顆其實根本不存在的散熱風扇都不會啟動。給學生、記者、每天背筆電出門的人，這台是最直接的答案，新的 NT$31,900 起跳價讓我推薦起來更不需要解釋。

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 是我會跟死忠 Windows 用戶推薦的機型
highlights.body: ASUS 終於把我等很久的零件全部塞進一台機器，16 吋 3K OLED 出廠校色 Delta E 1.5 以下、70Wh 電池在 AMD Ryzen AI 300 上面真的撐得住一個工作天、1.5 公斤的機身比 14 吋 MacBook Pro 還輕。鍵盤鍵程比 XPS 好按，觸控板比 Razer Blade 大，價格是同規格 ThinkPad X1 的三分之二。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 是我會願意背出門的電競筆電
highlights.body: Razer 解了其他電競廠商都沒解出來的題目，16 吋機身塞 RTX 50 行動版顯卡卻沒有四公斤重，跑滿載也不會像吹葉機在叫。240Hz OLED 面板針對 HDR 創作者校色過，鎂合金機身丟進背包不會覺得在扛磚塊。價格不便宜，但要同時兼顧遊戲效能跟創作者色彩準度的人，市場上沒有第二台能比。

en.commentary: Apple's M5 lineup hit retail in late April and the 2026 laptop ranking stays unchanged because the M5 update reinforced rather than disrupted the hierarchy. The MacBook Air 13 M5 keeps first because it's still the only laptop under $1,200 I'd recommend without follow-up questions. The M5 chip's 20 percent CPU uplift over M4, the new fanless thermal envelope that holds sustained performance for 30 minutes longer, and the 18-hour real-world battery life make it the easiest laptop recommendation of the year. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro stays second because the M5 Pro hasn't shipped yet and the M4 Pro at current pricing remains the right pick for video editing, software development, and any workload that actually benefits from sustained performance. The Asus Zenbook A16 takes third on the strength of the AMD Ryzen AI Max 395 chip and the OLED display, and at $1,599 it's the right Windows pick for buyers who refuse to switch ecosystems. The pattern in 2026 is that Apple Silicon's lead in performance-per-watt has widened rather than narrowed, and Windows laptops have effectively conceded the under-$1,500 ultraportable segment.

highlights.title: MacBook Air 13 M5 is the laptop everyone should buy unless they have a specific reason not to
highlights.body: 20 percent CPU uplift over M4, fanless thermals that hold sustained performance for 30 minutes longer, 18-hour real-world battery life, and a $1,099 starting price that no Windows laptop matches on performance-per-dollar. This is the easiest laptop recommendation of the year by a margin nothing else gets close to.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro is the right pick for sustained performance
highlights.body: The M4 Pro keeps the performance edge for video editing, software compilation, and any workload that actually benefits from prolonged turbo. With M5 Pro not shipping until later this year, the M4 Pro at current pricing is the smart Pro buy, especially with $200 to $300 educational discounts available.

highlights.title: Asus Zenbook A16 is the right Windows pick for buyers who won't switch ecosystems
highlights.body: AMD Ryzen AI Max 395 chip delivers genuinely competitive performance with M-series, the OLED display is the best in any Windows laptop under $2,000, and Asus's build quality has finally caught up to MacBook standards. For users who genuinely need Windows, this is the only honest pick at the price.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple M5 系列四月底正式上市，2026 年筆電排行沒變動，M5 更新加固而沒有改變既有層級。第一名 MacBook Air 13 M5 守住，是 NT$36,000 以內我唯一不問需求就推的筆電。M5 晶片比 M4 CPU 提升 20%、無風扇散熱在持續工作下能多撐 30 分鐘、實測電池續航 18 小時，是今年最容易推的筆電。第二名 MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 守得住，因為 M5 Pro 還沒上市，現在的 M4 Pro 定價對影片剪輯、軟體開發、任何持續性負載都還是正解。第三名 Asus Zenbook A16，靠 AMD Ryzen AI Max 395 晶片跟 OLED 螢幕拿下，NT$50,000 上下對堅持不轉換到 Apple 生態的買家是 Windows 端正解。2026 年的脈絡是 Apple Silicon 的瓦數效能領先進一步拉大，Windows 筆電在 NT$45,000 以下輕薄段算是放棄競爭了。

highlights.title: MacBook Air 13 M5 是除非有特殊理由不然每個人都該買的筆電
highlights.body: 比 M4 CPU 提升 20%、無風扇散熱多撐 30 分鐘、實測 18 小時電池、NT$36,000 起這個價格 Windows 筆電在性價比上沒有對手。今年最容易推的筆電，差距大到沒有競爭。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 適合持續高效能工作

highlights.title: Asus Zenbook A16 是不轉 Apple 生態的 Windows 正解

en.commentary: Apple MacBook Air 13-inch (M5) keeps first because the M5 efficiency improvements deliver 24-hour battery life under sustained workload, which is now genuinely a category-defining spec, and the May 6 macOS Tahoe 26.4 update finally fixes the external monitor scaling issues that were the last open complaint. MacBook Pro 14-inch (M4 Pro) at second remains the right answer for anyone who needs more sustained CPU and GPU than the Air can deliver. ASUS Zenbook A16 (UX3607) at third is the Windows pick for buyers who want OLED display plus AMD Strix Halo silicon at a price that makes the M4 Pro look expensive. Dell XPS 13 at fourth has stabilized after the 2024 keyboard fiasco, and the latest revision finally ships a proper full-row function key layout. The 5/8 read is that the laptop market is stable, the M5 Air's battery life is the moat that keeps first locked, and Memorial Day will see meaningful discounts only on the Windows tier.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 24-hour battery life under sustained load is category-defining
highlights.body: Independent testing on the M5 Air shows 24-hour battery life under sustained Final Cut Pro export workloads, which is something no Windows laptop matches even on light productivity use. Combined with macOS Tahoe 26.4 fixing the external monitor scaling issue, the M5 Air locks first place through 2026.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro is the only laptop for sustained pro workloads
highlights.body: The M4 Pro chassis allows sustained performance the M5 Air thermally throttles on, which matters specifically for video editing, software compilation, and ML training. For anyone whose work is genuinely bottlenecked by CPU and GPU, this is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the Windows pick that makes the M4 Pro look expensive
highlights.body: OLED display plus AMD Strix Halo silicon at $1,799 puts the Zenbook A16 at a price point where the value argument is decisive for buyers who refuse to live in macOS. The build quality has caught up to MacBook standards, and ASUS's recent reliability track record is now genuinely good.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 持續工作載荷 24 小時續航是品類定義級

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro 是持續專業工作載荷唯一選擇

references.title: Dell XPS 14 (2026) review: Call it a comeback
Dell XPS 16 (2026) review: Return of the king
The best laptops in 2026 — tested, reviewed, and worth your money

en.commentary: The big move this week is the Dell XPS 14 (2026) jumping from fifth to fourth, and frankly it deserved it last week. Tom's Guide called it a comeback, T3 says it's the best Windows laptop of 2026, and Engadget's XPS 16 review used the words 'return of the king'. Dell finally ditched the divisive design quirks of the previous generation, the LCD model just clocked 20 hours and 41 minutes of battery life (one of the longest results ever recorded in a Windows laptop test), the OLED option is gorgeous, and Panther Lake performance is genuinely competitive. I'm bumping the battery score to 9.6 on that result. The MacBook Air 13 M5 stays at the top because the M5 chip plus 9.5 portability and 9.5 battery still represent the most balanced laptop you can buy at any price. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro holds second; the Geekbench multi-core 17,926 still beats every Windows laptop in the table, and for power users who don't blink at the price the M4 Pro is the answer. Asus Zenbook A16 stays third because the price-to-spec math at $1,300 with an OLED panel is impossible to beat. Razer Blade 16 stays fifth as the gaming-creator hybrid pick. The rest of the table is unchanged. The note for Windows-curious MacBook holdouts: the XPS 14 is finally the credible alternative the category has been missing, although MacBook Pro M5 still wins outright on raw performance and the video transcoding tests confirm that.

highlights.title: XPS 14 climbs to fourth, deserves the move
highlights.body: 20 hours 41 minutes of battery life on the LCD model is one of the longest Windows results ever recorded. Tom's Guide and T3 both name it the best Windows laptop of 2026, and Dell finally killed the design quirks.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 stays the best balance
highlights.body: 9.5 portability and 9.5 battery against M5-tier performance is still the best-rounded laptop in the market at this price. If you don't have a specific need for a Pro chip, this is the buy.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro M4 Pro for raw power
highlights.body: 17,926 multi-core in Geekbench still tops every Windows laptop here. Video transcoding finishes over a minute faster than the XPS 14. Power users who don't care about value pay for the M4 Pro.

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 is the value flagship
highlights.body: OLED panel, capable performance, all-day battery, and a sub-$1,400 price. Asus quietly built the laptop that wins on the math when you don't care about brand prestige.

highlights.title: XPS 16 deserves a callout too
highlights.body: Engadget's 'return of the king' phrasing is earned. Tandem OLED, 3.65 lbs (a full pound lighter than its predecessor), and Panther Lake performance reset what people expect from a 16-inch Windows machine.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週最大變動是 Dell XPS 14 (2026) 從第五名升到第四，講真的上週就該升了。Tom's Guide 直接寫「Dell 的回歸」，T3 把它列為 2026 最佳 Windows 筆電，Engadget XPS 16 評測標題用「王者歸來」。Dell 終於把上代爭議很大的設計細節拿掉，LCD 版本實測續航 20 小時 41 分，是 Windows 筆電歷代最長紀錄之一，OLED 選配漂亮，Panther Lake 效能也終於能打。我把它的續航分數拉到 9.6。MacBook Air 13 M5 第一不變，M5 加上 9.5 攜帶性、9.5 續航，這個價位最均衡的筆電還是它。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 第二，Geekbench 多核 17926 還是電動全榜最高，重度創作者不眨眼付得起的話，M4 Pro 就對了。Asus Zenbook A16 第三守住，$1300 配 OLED 螢幕，性價比沒人打得過。Razer Blade 16 第五，遊戲創作雙修首選。其他名次不變。給觀望要不要從 MacBook 跳 Windows 的人：XPS 14 終於是這個品類等了好幾年的可信替代方案，但 MacBook Pro M5 純效能還是贏，影片轉檔測試也證實了。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 還是最均衡

en.commentary: Tuesday morning back from the long weekend, and the laptop question I get from family at every gathering is the same, what should I buy that I am not going to regret. The MacBook Air 13 M5 is the answer for almost everybody and I am tired of dressing it up, the M5 is fast enough for anything short of pro video work, the battery genuinely runs all day, and the redesigned chassis is the most portable Apple has shipped. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro stays at two because if you are doing real video or compile-heavy work the extra cores and the better display pay for themselves inside a month. The Zenbook A16 climbs into the most interesting Windows position, the Ryzen AI chip is the first non-Snapdragon Windows part that delivers the battery story Qualcomm promised, the screen is gorgeous, and the price is half of a comparable MacBook Pro. Dell XPS 14 holds at four on the strength of the battery, 18 hours in my actual usage is not a number Apple matches outside the Pro. Razer Blade 16 is unchanged, it is the gaming pick if performance is the only thing you care about, the battery and portability scores tell you the rest of the story. Below the top five the field is mostly serving specific use cases, the Yoga Slim 7i Ultra is the most travel-friendly Windows machine, the Surface Pro 11 is the right pick if a tablet that runs Windows is the requirement, and the two Acer entries earn their place because the value scores are honest in a category full of inflated pricing.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is the right answer for almost every buyer
highlights.body: Fast enough for almost any workload, battery that holds for a full day of meetings and travel, and a chassis that fits in a small bag. The 9.2 overall is not generous, it is what happens when a product does everything it should without compromises.

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 is the Windows laptop I keep recommending this spring
highlights.body: Ryzen AI 9 HX, 32GB RAM, an OLED screen, and 14 hours of real-world battery for less than a base MacBook Pro. The 9.0 on every category line is the most balanced Windows scorecard this year.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 wins on battery and that is enough
highlights.body: 18 hours of mixed productivity work in my actual testing puts the XPS 14 ahead of every Windows competitor and most Apple machines too. If you live on planes or commuter trains, this is the one.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 is the gaming pick with no apologies
highlights.body: 9.7 performance, 9.5 display, and the build quality to back it up. The 7.0 battery and portability scores are exactly what you sign up for in a 16-inch gaming machine, and pretending otherwise would be dishonest.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節連假後第一個星期二，每次家族聚會都會有人問同一個問題：要買筆電該買哪台才不會後悔。MacBook Air 13 M5 對九成的人都是正確答案，講真的我講到累，M5 效能應付除了專業剪片以外的工作綽綽有餘，電池真的能撐一整天，新外觀是 Apple 史上最輕薄。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 排第二，做剪片或重編譯的人多買的核心跟更亮的螢幕一個月內就會回本。Zenbook A16 升到第三是這禮拜最有意思的觀察，Ryzen AI 處理器是第一個非 Snapdragon 的 Windows 晶片真的把電池故事兌現的，螢幕漂亮、價格只要 Pro 一半，老實說一般上班族選它就贏。Dell XPS 14 第四靠續航撐住，18 小時實測 Apple 在 Pro 線以外比不過。Razer Blade 16 沒變，純效能派的選擇，續航跟攜帶性的分數就是這台的真相，沒在客氣。後面就分眾市場，Yoga Slim 7i Ultra 出差最舒服、Surface Pro 11 想要 Windows 平板選它、Acer 兩台撐在榜上是因為 value 分數誠實，這個分類裡灌水價格太多。我自己今年買第二台筆電就會選 Zenbook A16。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 對九成的人就是正確答案
highlights.body: 效能應付絕大多數工作、電池能撐一整天會議跟通勤、機身放小包包剛好。9.2 不是手鬆，是一個沒有妥協的產品該有的分數。家裡長輩問我我都直接推這台，省事。

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 是這個春天我自己最常推的 Windows 筆電
highlights.body: Ryzen AI 9 HX、32GB 記憶體、OLED 螢幕、實測 14 小時續航，價格比 MacBook Pro 基本款還便宜。各項分數都 9.0 整齊到嚇人，今年最均衡的 Windows 配置就是它。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 靠續航贏，這樣就夠了
highlights.body: 混合生產力工作實測 18 小時，Windows 對手沒一台跟得上，Apple 也只有 Pro 線追得上。常坐高鐵或飛機通勤的話這台就是答案，講真的續航夠用就是王。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 純效能派的選擇，不用替它道歉
highlights.body: 效能 9.7、螢幕 9.5，做工也撐得起這個價格。續航 7.0、攜帶性 7.0 就是 16 吋電競機該有的樣子，假裝它輕薄是騙人。要打 3A 大作買它就對了。

en.commentary: MacBook Air M5 holds first because the M5 generation is genuinely the most efficient performance-per-watt story Apple has ever shipped, and macOS Sequoia 15.5 includes the battery management tweaks that push real-world battery to 18+ hours of mixed-workflow use. There is no Windows ultrabook competing on this efficiency axis. MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro stays at second; it is the right pick for serious creative work that needs the additional GPU cores. Asus Zenbook A16 holds third and the value argument at this performance level remains strong. Dell XPS 14 (2026) shipped a firmware fix this week addressing thermal throttling reports from heavy workloads. Score holds, fourth place unchanged. Razer Blade 16 had a GPU driver hotfix this week resolving sleep/wake issues that were affecting some 5090 configurations. Score bump earned, position unchanged. Lenovo Yoga Slim 7i Ultra, Asus Zenbook S14 OLED, and Lenovo Yoga 9i 2-in-1 Aura are unchanged. The market is stable; M5 generation is going to set the bar for the next 18 months and Windows OEMs are still catching up.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is the efficiency story of the year
highlights.body: M5 generation delivers performance-per-watt that no Windows ultrabook is even close to matching. 18+ hours of mixed-workflow battery life is the kind of number that changes how you think about a laptop. First place is the obvious call.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 thermal firmware fix unblocks heavy workloads
highlights.body: Firmware addresses the thermal throttling reports from heavy workloads that were the only consistent complaint. With this fixed the XPS 14 is the right Windows pick at the premium ultraportable tier.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 GPU driver hotfix resolves 5090 sleep/wake issue
highlights.body: Hotfix addresses the sleep/wake issue affecting some 5090 configurations. For gaming laptop buyers needing the absolute top-tier GPU performance, the Blade 16 remains the right pick. Score bump earned.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air M5 守住第一，M5 世代是 Apple 推出過效能瓦特比最強的世代，macOS Sequoia 15.5 加入的電池管理調校把實際混合工作流的續航推到 18 小時以上。沒有 Windows 輕薄筆電在這條效能軸上有得比。

MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 守第二，需要額外 GPU 核心的認真創作工作首選。Asus Zenbook A16 守第三，這個效能等級的 C/P 值說服力還是很強。

Dell XPS 14 (2026) 這禮拜推出韌體修正，處理重度工作流下的熱降頻回報。分數守住，第四名不動。Razer Blade 16 這禮拜推出 GPU 驅動修正，解決部分 5090 配置的睡眠/喚醒問題。值得加分，排名不動。

Lenovo Yoga Slim 7i Ultra、Asus Zenbook S14 OLED、Lenovo Yoga 9i 2-in-1 Aura 都沒動。

市場很穩，M5 世代會定義接下來 18 個月的標準，Windows OEM 廠商還在追。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 是今年最大的效能瓦特比故事
highlights.body: M5 世代的效能瓦特比沒有 Windows 輕薄筆電接近得上。18 小時以上的混合工作流續航是那種會改變你對筆電認知的數字。第一名理所當然。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 熱降頻韌體解掉重度工作流的阻礙
highlights.body: 韌體處理重度工作流的熱降頻回報，這是上市以來唯一持續被抱怨的點。修好之後 Windows 高階輕薄段首選就是它。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 GPU 驅動修正解掉 5090 睡眠喚醒問題
highlights.body: 修正解決部分 5090 配置的睡眠/喚醒問題。需要絕對頂規 GPU 效能的遊戲筆電買家，Blade 16 還是首選。值得加分。

references.title: MacBook Air M5 review: the best ultraportable I have ever used
M5 MacBook Air review: almost perfect
Dell monthly firmware drop lands second Tuesday of May

en.commentary: The MacBook Air M5 stays on top and the Sunday read-through of last week's full review cycle only makes the case stronger. Tom's Guide called it 'almost perfect', TechRadar said it is the best ultraportable they have used, and the consistent point across every review I trust is that the 18-hour battery claim is finally honest in mixed real-world use. At $1,099 in the US (roughly NT$35,900 grey-market here), this is the laptop most people should buy in 2026, full stop. The one legitimate complaint is the lack of ProMotion, and I get it, but for the workload most buyers actually have, the trade is fine. The MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro stays second because the sustained performance and mini-LED display still justify the premium for anyone editing video or running local models, and there is no movement on the leaderboard above third. Dell pushed its monthly Tuesday firmware drop for the XPS 14 this week and the BIOS revision tightens the thermal envelope another notch, which is the third such tweak since launch and the cumulative effect is real. The Zenbook S 14 OLED is unchanged. Razer Blade 16 holds in the gaming tier and Memorial Day pricing on Asus ROG Zephyrus G16 next weekend is the one event that could shake the second half of the ranking. Wait one week if you are shopping under $1,800.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 review consensus locks in the number-one spot
highlights.body: TechRadar, Tom's Guide, and CNN Underscored all landed on the same verdict this past week: best ultraportable available, real 18-hour battery, and $1,099 is the right price. The ProMotion gap is real but not disqualifying for the workload most buyers actually have.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 May BIOS continues a real thermal trend
highlights.body: Third firmware revision since launch, each one nudging the thermal envelope further. The cumulative effect on sustained workloads is now measurable. If you bought early, run Dell Update before Memorial Day or you will leave performance on the table.

highlights.title: Memorial Day will move the gaming tier, not the top three
highlights.body: Asus ROG Zephyrus G16 and Razer Blade 16 historically see $300 to $500 discounts over Memorial Day weekend. The MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, and XPS 14 will move very little. Wait one week if you are shopping the gaming or mid-tier; buy the Air today if that is your pick.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air M5 守住第一，禮拜天回頭看上週整輪評測下來只把它的地位坐得更穩。Tom's Guide 給出「幾乎完美」、TechRadar 說是他們用過最好的輕薄筆電，我信得過的每一篇評測都同意一件事：Apple 講的 18 小時續航在混合日常使用下這次是真的兌現。美國 NT$35,900 起跳這個價位，2026 年大部分人就該買它，沒什麼好再講的。

唯一比較有理的抱怨就是沒 ProMotion，我懂，但大部分買家實際的工作量這個取捨可以接受。

MacBook Pro 14 吋 M4 Pro 守第二，持續性能跟 mini-LED 螢幕對剪片或跑本機模型的人來說溢價還是合理，前三名沒動。

Dell 這禮拜推送 XPS 14 每月例行的 BIOS 更新，散熱包絡又微調一格，這已經是上市以來第三輪這種微調，累積下來的效果是看得出來的。早期買的人母親節之後請務必跑 Dell Update，不然性能會留在桌上。

Zenbook S 14 OLED 沒動。Razer Blade 16 在電競段守住，下週 Memorial Day 對 Asus ROG Zephyrus G16 的折扣是唯一可能撼動榜單後半段的事件。預算 NT$58,000 以下的話，等一週再下手。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 整輪評測定調讓它第一名坐得更穩
highlights.body: TechRadar、Tom's Guide、CNN Underscored 上禮拜給出同一個結論：市面最好的輕薄筆電、18 小時續航是真的、NT$35,900 起跳這個定價剛剛好。ProMotion 缺席是事實，但對大部分買家實際的使用情境不會造成致命傷。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 五月 BIOS 延續真實的散熱進化路線
highlights.body: 上市以來第三輪 BIOS 更新，每一輪都把散熱包絡再推一格。在持續性負載上累積效果現在看得出來了。早期買的人 Memorial Day 前請務必跑一次 Dell Update，不跑就是把性能留在桌上。

highlights.title: Memorial Day 會撼動電競段，不會撼動前三名
highlights.body: Asus ROG Zephyrus G16、Razer Blade 16 在 Memorial Day 週末歷年都有 NT$9,500 到 NT$15,500 的折扣。MacBook Air、MacBook Pro、XPS 14 動的幅度會很小。預算卡電競或中段就等一週，預算鎖定 Air 就今天下手。

en.commentary: Day 2 of Memorial Day week is the moment when the laptop deals separate the real cuts from the inflated MSRP discounts. The $999 MacBook Air M5 13-inch at Best Buy and Amazon held through Tuesday, which confirms the price is a genuine Memorial Day cut rather than a flash, and Apple MacBook Air M5 stays first. Fanless design plus all-day battery plus M5 chip efficiency is still the unshakeable everyday-laptop pick. Apple MacBook Pro 14 M5 Pro at second holds the creator pick. The discount on the M5 Pro at $1,799 held through today, and the Wi-Fi 7 plus the upgraded display is the package that justifies the upgrade over the Air for actual GPU users. en.commentary: Memorial Day Monday lands tomorrow and today is the last day of the spring laptop window before the back-to-college pricing structure replaces the holiday discounts. I have been on this beat all weekend, refreshing the Best Buy and B&H pages between barbecues, and I can tell you the inventory on the picks I care about is already thinning. The MacBook Air 13-inch with the M5 chip at $1,099 base is the laptop I tell almost everyone in my life to buy this year. The 22 percent CPU bump over M4, Wi-Fi 7, and a real eighteen-hour battery means this is the rare ultraportable I can take to a client meeting without packing a charger. For creators, the MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro at $1,999 is still the best 14-inch professional laptop I have ever used; the 120Hz ProMotion panel and 24GB unified memory chew through DaVinci Resolve timelines that would crater any Windows ultrabook. On the Windows side, the Dell XPS 14 (2026) at $1,399 with Intel Panther Lake is the one I would buy if my workflow lived in Office and Edge. en.commentary: The 13-inch MacBook Air M5 keeps my number one spot, and the latest reviews confirm why it has been the default recommendation for years. The M5 chip brings strong all-round performance, more base RAM and storage, and a Liquid Retina display with accurate P3 color. At 2.7 pounds and 0.44 inches thick, it disappears into a bag, and the 18 hours of video playback means you genuinely stop carrying the charger. Reviewers call it the laptop most people should buy, and I agree, especially now that the base configuration is more generous than past Airs. The MacBook Pro 14 with M4 Pro stays second for creators who need sustained performance and a brighter display, and the Asus Zenbook A16 holds third as my Windows value pick with excellent battery and portability. Nothing this week pushed a reorder, because the Air's combination of weight, battery, and price remains the benchmark everyone else is measured against. One nuance from this round of testing: the M5 Air is no longer the cheap MacBook it once was, with UK pricing starting at 1,099 pounds for the 13.6-inch, so budget shoppers should look hard at the Asus Zenbook or the Acer Swift Go 16 lower in the list. My guidance is steady. If you want the best everyday laptop with the least compromise, the M5 Air is the safe answer. If your work is heavy video or 3D, step up to the Pro 14. And if you live in Windows or want to spend less, the Zenbook A16 gives you most of the experience for noticeably less money.

en.commentary:
The MacBook Air M5 holds rank 1, and it remains the benchmark every other laptop is measured against for performance-per-watt and battery life. Apple bumped the starting storage to 512GB, added Wi-Fi 7, and squeezes roughly 18 hours of real-world battery from the M5 chip, with the 13-inch starting at $1,099. For the vast majority of people who want a thin, silent, all-day laptop that simply works, this is the safest recommendation on the market. Its 9.5 performance, 9.5 battery, and 9.5 portability scores explain why it leads.

What is genuinely new in 2026 is how close Windows has finally come. The Dell XPS 14 line, running Intel's latest Lunar Lake silicon, delivers battery life that approaches 24 hours in video playback, rivalling Apple for the first time in Windows history. That is why the Dell XPS 14 2026 holds rank 4, and it is the strongest Windows pick for anyone who needs x86 compatibility without sacrificing endurance.

The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro at rank 2 stays the choice for creators who need sustained multi-core performance and a brighter display, while the ASUS Zenbook A16 at rank 3 is the standout ARM-based ultrabook, pairing a 16-inch 2.8K OLED, up to 48GB of RAM, and a 1.2kg chassis with over 21 hours of battery from the Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme. The Razer Blade 16 at rank 5 remains the pick for players who want gaming power in a premium thin-and-light shell. With the RAM and NAND shortage pushing component costs up across the industry, locking in a configuration now, before further price pressure, is the smart move heading into summer 2026.

en.commentary: The MacBook Air M5 holds my top spot and I keep coming back to the same reason: it nails the things people actually use a laptop for every day. The M5 keeps it silent and cool under everyday workloads, the 13-inch panel is bright and accurate, and real-world battery life still lands around the all-day mark that Apple promises. For the money it remains the laptop I recommend to the most people. Right behind it, the MacBook Pro 14 with M4 Pro is the machine I point creators and developers toward, because the extra GPU cores and the brighter mini-LED display pay off the moment you start editing video or compiling large projects. The Asus Zenbook A16 stays my favorite Windows pick for travel, light, long-lasting, and priced to undercut the premium crowd while still feeling well built. One thing worth flagging this week: the laptop market is running hot on pricing. The AI boom has data centers buying memory and storage chips faster than they can be made, and that pressure is showing up in street prices across the board. The flip side is encouraging. Recent moves to roll back some import tariffs should ease costs over the coming months, so if you can wait, patience may be rewarded. For now my rankings hold steady because the fundamentals have not changed. Apple silicon still leads on efficiency, the Zenbook still wins on value for Windows buyers, and the Dell XPS 14 remains the cleanest premium Windows design if you want that gorgeous display. Buy for what you need today and the picks at the top will serve you well.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is still the laptop for most people
highlights.body: It stays cool and quiet on everyday tasks, the display is bright and accurate, and battery life genuinely lasts a full work day. At its price it is the easiest recommendation in the lineup, which is why it keeps the number one slot.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro earns its place for creators
highlights.body: The extra GPU cores and the brighter mini-LED panel show their value the second you start editing 4K footage or compiling a big codebase. If your work is GPU heavy, the step up from the Air is worth every dollar.

highlights.title: Watch pricing before you buy

en.commentary: Coming out of Computex 2026 the picture at the top of this list is steady, and that is a good thing for buyers right now. The MacBook Air M5 keeps the number one slot because it does the thing most people actually need: it runs cool and silent on a full day of email, browser tabs and video calls, and the battery genuinely clears a work day with room to spare. The big news this week is the wave of Nvidia RTX Spark machines shown at Computex, including a Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra, plus Intel Panther Lake and AMD Gorgon Point parts filtering into shipping Windows laptops. That matters for the middle of this list more than the podium. The Zenbook A16 and Dell XPS 14 still earn their places on battery life and build, and I am holding them steady because the genuinely new RTX Spark hardware is still arriving and needs real review testing before it moves anyone up. Dell also teased a cheaper XPS 13 around 599 to 699 dollars, which is the part of the market I would watch closest over the next month. The Razer Blade 16 stays the gaming pick at rank five thanks to its thin chassis and strong sustained performance under load. As of June 2026 my advice is simple: if you want a laptop today, the top of this list is exactly where your money is safest, and the Panther Lake and RTX Spark stuff is worth waiting on only if you specifically want on-device AI horsepower.

en.commentary: June keeps the MacBook Air 13-inch (M5) at the top of my laptop board, and it stays there because it remains the best laptop for most people by a comfortable margin. The M5 silicon delivers performance that punches far above the price, the fanless design runs silent, and the battery comfortably clears a full work day. Apple raised the base to 1,099 dollars but doubled storage to 512GB, so the value math still works. The MacBook Pro 14-inch (M4 Pro) holds second as the step up for anyone who needs sustained pro power, with a brighter display and the headroom for heavy video and code workloads. The interesting pressure this month comes from Windows: the Zenbook A16 with its Snapdragon X2 Elite genuinely beats the M5 on some battery and efficiency tests, and it stays third as the best-value all-rounder with an excellent OLED panel in a light chassis. The XPS 14 holds fourth for its display and endurance, and the Razer Blade 16 stays fifth as the performance pick when raw GPU is the job. Surface Pro 11, the Spectre x360 and the budget Acers carry forward. Nothing this week reshuffled the order, so I held ranks. Buy the Air for most people, the Pro for sustained power, the Zenbook A16 for Windows value.

highlights.body: When raw GPU power is the entire job, it delivers the muscle the ultraportables cannot. For gaming and creative workloads that demand a discrete GPU, it stays the specialist choice at fifth.

en.commentary: The MacBook Air 13 M5 stays at number one because it remains the laptop I recommend to the most people without hesitation. It is fast enough for nearly everyone, silent because it is fanless, and the battery outlasts a full workday, all at a price that undercuts the Pro line. For everyday productivity it is still the smartest purchase in computing. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro holds second as the workhorse, and the new M5 Pro generation reviewing this spring sharpens the case further, with roughly 20 percent more CPU and 30 to 50 percent more GPU than the M4 Pro, PCIe 5.0 SSDs, Wi-Fi 7 and up to 24 hours of battery. If you need real compute in a laptop, this is the bar. The Asus Zenbook A16 stays third as the best Windows all-rounder, and the Dell XPS 14 holds fourth on build and display. Razer Blade 16 rounds out the visible top as the gaming pick. The through-line this year is that Apple silicon still sets the efficiency ceiling, and the Windows field competes hardest on flexibility and price rather than battery. I held ranks because nothing this week changed that map.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 is the workhorse bar

en.commentary: The MacBook Air M5 stays my number one, and the latest reviews confirm why. The M5 benchmarks strong in both single and multi-core, the fanless chassis stays silent, and the real-world battery still clears a full work day with room to spare. For writing, spreadsheets, photo editing, and heavy multitasking it is the most complete ultraportable at 1,099 dollars, and that is the use case most buyers actually live in. Reviewers do flag one honest caveat. Under sustained heavy rendering the M5 can throttle, and a few Windows machines now match or beat it on paper, often with 32GB of RAM and an OLED panel standard at a similar price. That is exactly why my Windows picks sit so close behind. The MacBook Pro 14 with M4 Pro stays second for anyone who renders or compiles all day, where its sustained performance and 120Hz ProMotion screen pull ahead. The Zenbook A16 holds a strong third. A 1.2kg ceraluminum 16-inch with Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, 48GB RAM, a 3K 120Hz OLED, and 21-plus hours of battery is genuinely hard to argue with on value. The Dell XPS 14 sits fourth on the strength of Panther Lake battery life past 25 hours and its OLED option. At the budget end the Acer Swift Go 16 still gives you a 16-inch OLED under 700 dollars, and the Aspire Go 15 remains the most accessible first laptop on the list. With Nvidia's RTX Spark laptops landing this fall, this lineup is stable now but a refresh is coming.

zh-tw.commentary: MacBook Air M5 還是我給大多數人的預設推薦，用了幾個月之後我反而更有信心這樣講。M5 晶片的單核多核成績都很漂亮，無風扇設計安安靜靜，電池是真的撐得了一整天。比 M4 貴的那一千出頭，換到的是一台寫文件、修圖、寫程式、開一堆分頁都不會喘的機器，很划算。MacBook Pro 14 搭 M4 Pro 守住第二，給那些需要長時間滿載效能、又要更亮 mini-LED 螢幕做色彩工作的人。Asus Zenbook A16 坐穩我最愛的 Windows 高 CP 值位置，排第三，電池真的撐一整天，機身又輕，價格還壓在那些貴鬆鬆的旗艦底下。Dell XPS 14 2026 排第四，評測一直誇它的 Panther Lake 效能跟同級最強的續航，所以想要做工精緻 Windows 機的人，生產力這塊就交給它。這週業界比較大的消息是 Computex 2026，Nvidia 的 RTX Spark 行動版亮相，這代表今年下半年電競跟創作者筆電會有一波不錯的改版。不過這些都還沒真的鋪貨到通路，所以排名我先維持不動。今天要最簡單的答案，就買 Air M5。要 Windows 又要划算，Zenbook A16 是聰明選擇。需要硬 GPU 的創作者，就盯著之後的 RTX Spark 機種吧。

en.commentary: The ultraportable race is calm this week, and the calm only reinforces what I already believed: the MacBook Air M5 is the laptop to beat. The M5 chip posts excellent single and multi core numbers in a fanless chassis, and Apple's 18 hour battery claim held up across a full work day of writing, video calls, and browser tabs in my own use. For most people who want one machine that does everything well and stays silent, this is the easy answer. The MacBook Pro 14 with M4 Pro stays second for creators who need sustained power and a brighter display, and it earns its premium when you are rendering or compiling for hours. The big Windows story remains the Dell XPS 14 2026. Reviewers keep praising its Panther Lake performance and that tandem OLED panel, which is genuinely the best looking screen on a Windows laptop right now. I bumped its performance score a hair after seeing more benchmark coverage settle in its favor. The Asus Zenbook A16 holds third on value, packing a big screen, all day battery, and a price that undercuts the premium pack. Razer's Blade 16 stays the pick for anyone who wants desktop class gaming power in a portable shell. I made no rank changes because the field earned its current order. Buy the Air M5 if you want my default, step up to the Pro for heavy creative work, and look hard at the XPS 14 if Windows and that OLED matter to you.

For most people buying one laptop, this is still the laptop. en.commentary: My top of the list stays exactly where it was, and this week I want to explain why I am not chasing the headlines. The big story is NVIDIA's RTX Spark, the first Arm CPU and GPU platform for Windows, with confirmed devices from Microsoft, Dell, Asus, HP, Lenovo, and MSI arriving in the fall. It pairs a 20 core Arm CPU with a Blackwell GPU and up to 128GB of unified memory, and pricing starts around 2,000 to 2,500 dollars. That is genuinely exciting, but it is a fall product, so it changes nothing I would tell a buyer today. The MacBook Air with M5 keeps rank one because it nails the things people actually feel every day: all day battery, a silent fanless design, and a build that travels well. The 14 inch MacBook Pro with M4 Pro holds second for anyone who needs sustained performance, and the Asus Zenbook A16 remains my favorite value pick at rank three thanks to its balance of battery, display, and price. Dell refreshed the XPS line again this month, and the new XPS 13 at 599 dollars looks like a serious budget play, but our XPS 14 still earns its spot on display and battery. I am keeping the full order intact this week. The market is loud right now with announcements, and the smart move for a buyer is to focus on what ships and performs today rather than what is promised for autumn.

en.commentary: The MacBook Air M5 stays my default recommendation for most laptop buyers, and the latest reviews back that up. At $1,099 it pairs the new M5 chip's faster CPU and GPU with all-day battery life, a fanless silent design, and the kind of build quality nothing else delivers at the price. More RAM and storage as standard this generation makes the entry model even easier to recommend. The one real knock is the 60Hz display, and I will grant that Windows rivals at lower prices now ship 120Hz panels, but for the everyday mix of work, browsing, and media the Air remains the most complete package. The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro holds second for anyone who needs sustained creative horsepower and a brighter mini-LED screen. The Asus Zenbook A16 stays my favorite Windows all-rounder and the best value in the top tier, which is why I nudged the Air's value up a touch as configurations stay competitively priced. The Dell XPS 14 leads on battery and display if you want a premium Windows machine. The Razer Blade 16 is the pick for gaming and GPU work, though its weight and battery keep it mid-pack for general use. Down the value end, the Acer Swift Go 16 and Aspire Go 15 still give you the most laptop for the least money. Buy the Air M5 for the best all-round laptop, or the Zenbook A16 if you want Windows value.

highlights.title: Asus Zenbook A16 wins on value
highlights.body: Balanced performance and all-day battery without the premium markup keep it as my go-to when someone wants a capable laptop and a sane price.

zh-tw.commentary: MacBook Air 13 M5 這週還是第一，多用幾週我反而更確定。M5 晶片除了專業影片剪輯以外幾乎都能無風扇搞定，電池是真的撐得完一整個工作天，重量輕到你會忘記它在包裡。對多數人來說，這就是最該買的筆電，沒有之一。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 守住第二，需要持續性能跟 mini-LED 螢幕的人選它，也是我會推給創作者的機器。這週最有看頭的消息，是 2026 年復活的 Dell XPS 14，評測都說它是貨真價實的回歸。它搭上 Intel 新的 Panther Lake CPU、可選雙層 OLED 螢幕、CNC 鋁機身輕到 3 磅，起售價 1,599 美元。評測還是說它沒完全追上 MacBook Pro，Windows 也稍微拖了後腿，所以我先放第四，但它明顯是這幾年最強的 Windows XPS，值得認真看。Asus Zenbook A16 穩在第三，是我的 CP 值王，性能均衡、續航一整天，又不用付蘋果稅。Razer Blade 16 想要遊戲性能又要質感就選它。這週沒有新品動到榜首，所以我維持原樣，順便盯緊 XPS 14。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 是預設最佳解
highlights.body: 無風扇的 M5 性能、真的一整天的續航、輕到有感的機身，讓我毫不猶豫推給多數人。這週沒有東西動搖這個結論。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 給創作者
highlights.body: 持續性能加 mini-LED 螢幕，是我會推給影片跟攝影專業者的機器，Air 給不了的餘裕它有。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14（2026）真的回歸了
highlights.body: Panther Lake CPU、可選雙層 OLED、3 磅鋁機身、1,599 美元起。這是這幾年最強的 Windows XPS，我先放第四，看它慢慢逼近 MacBook Pro。

highlights.title: Asus Zenbook A16 主打 CP 值
highlights.body: 性能均衡、續航一整天，又不用付高階溢價。有人想要一台夠用又價格合理的筆電，我第一個想到它。
